# 1 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 5
addi x6, x0, 7
add x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 12

# 2 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, -1
addi x6, x0, 1
add x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0

# 3 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 10
addi x6, x0, 15
add x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 25

# 4 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, -1
addi x6, x0, 1
add x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0

# 5 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, 5
addi a1, x0, 7
add a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 12

# 6 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 5
add x6, x5, x5
# Result: x6 = 10

# 7 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, -1
# Result: x5 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 8 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, -1
# Result: t0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 9 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5, 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
addi x5, x5, 1
# Result: x5 = 0x8000000000000000

# 10 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 0x7F
# Result: a0 = 0x7f

# 11 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, 0x7ff
addi t1, t0, 0
# Result: t1 = 0x7ff

# 12 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui x5,0x7ffff
addi x5, x5, 0xfff
addiw x6, x5, 1
# Result: x6 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 13 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, -1
addiw x6, x5, 1
# Result: x6 = 0

# 14 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5, 0x7fffffff
addiw x6, x5, 1
# Result: x6 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 15 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui a0, 0x80000
addi a0, a0, -1
addiw a0, a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 16 # Extension Must Be Active: I
addi x5, x0, -1
addiw x6, x5, 0
# Result: x6 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 17 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5, 0xffffffff80000005
addiw x6, x5, 0
# Result: x6 = 0xffffffff80000005

# 18 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -1
li a1, -1
addw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 19 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x7fffffff
li a1, 1
addw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 20 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x80000001
li a1, 0x1
addw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffff80000002

# 21 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x7fffffff
li a1, 1
addw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 22 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 255
addi x6, x0, 15
and x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0xf

# 23 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui x5,0xFF00F
ori x5,x5,0xF00
lui x6,0x0F0F0
ori x6,x6,0xF0F
and x7,x5,x6
# Result: x7 = 0x0f000f00

# 24 # Extension Must Be Active: I
addi t0, zero, -1 # t0 = 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
li t1, 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F
and t2, t0, t1 # t2 = t0 & t1
# Result: t2 = 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F

# 25 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0xF0F0F0F0
li t1, 0x0F0F0F0F
and a0, t0, t1
# Result: a0 = 0

# 26 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0xfffffffffffffffe
li t1, 0x1
and t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0

# 27 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5, 0x123456789ABCDEF0
andi x6, x5, -1
# Result: x6 = 0x123456789ABCDEF0

# 28 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, -1
andi a1, a0, 0xff
# Result: a1 = 0xff

# 29 # Extension Must Be Active: Zbb
li t0, 0xF0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0
li t1, 0x0FF00FF00FF00FF0
andn t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xF000F000F000F000

# 30 # Extension Must Be Active: I
addi x5, x0, -1
andi x6, x5, 0xF
# Result: x6 = 15

# 31 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, 0x7ff
andi t1, t0, 0xf0
# Result: t1 = 0xf0

# 32 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5, 0x123456789ABCDEF0
andi x6, x5, 0x800
# Result: x6 = 0x123456789ABCD000

# 33 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 255
andi x6, x5, 0xF
# Result: x6 = 0xF

# 34 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 42
andi x5, x5, -1
# Result: x5 = 42

# 35 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, -1
andi x6, x5, 0x0F0F
# Result: x6 = 0x0f0f

# 36 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, -1
andi a1, a0, 0xff
# Result: a1 = 0xff

# 37 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc t0, 0x12345
# Result: t0 = 0x923451f6

# 38 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc t0, 0x1
# Result: t0 = 0x800011f6

# 39 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc x5, 0x80000
# Result: x5 = 0x1f6

# 40 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc a0, 0x80000
# Result: a0 = 0x1fa

# 41 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc t0, 1
# Result: t0 = 0x800011f6

# 42 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc t0,0
jalr ra,8(t0)
target:
li a0,0xdeadbeef
jalr x0,0(ra)
# Result: a0 = 0xdeadbeef

# 43 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc t0,0
lw t1,0(t0)
# Result: t1 = 0x00000297

# 44 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc x5, 0
# Result: x5 = 0x800001f6

# 45 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi x5, x0, 1
addi x6, x0, 2
c.add x5, x6
# Result: x5 = 0x3

# 46 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi x5, x0, 5
addi x6, x0, 7
c.add x5, x6
# Result: x5 = 12

# 47 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 5
li a1, 7
c.add a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 12

# 48 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi x5, x0, 0
c.addi x5, 5
# Result: a0 = 2

# 49 # Extension Must Be Active: C
c.addi a0, 5
# Result: a0 = 5

# 50 # Extension Must Be Active: C
c.addi a0, 5
# Result: a0 = 5

# 51 # Extension Must Be Active: C
c.addiw a0, 5
# Result: a0 = 5

# 52 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0,0x80000001
c.sext.w a0
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffff80000001

# 53 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, -1
slli a0, a0, 32
srli a0, a0, 32
mv a1, a0
c.sext.w a1
mv a2, a0
c.addiw a2, 0
# Result: a1 = 0xffffffffffffffff & a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 54 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 5
li a1, 10
c.addw a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 15

# 55 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi s0, x0, 5
addi s1, x0, 7
c.addw s0, s1
# Result: s0 = 12

# 56 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi s0, x0, 1
addi s1, x0, -1
c.addw s0, s1
# Result: s0 = 0

# 57 # Extension Must Be Active: RVC
li a0, 0xff
li a1, 0xf
c.and a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 0xf

# 58 # Extension Must Be Active: RVC
c.li s0, 15
c.li s1, 10
c.and s0, s1
# Result: s0 = 0xa

# 59 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 0xFF00FF00FF00FF00
li a1, 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F
c.and a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 0x0f000f000f000f00

# 60 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi a0, x0, 0xAA
c.andi a0, 0xF
# Result: a0 = 0xa

# 61 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li s0, 0xFF
c.andi s0, 0xF
# Result: s0 = 0xF

# 62 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a1, 0x1234
c.or a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 0x1234

# 63 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 0x12345678abcdef00
li a1, 0x0000ffff0000ffff
c.or a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 0x1234ffffabcdffff

# 64 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 0x12345678abcdef01
li a1, 0x1111111100000000
c.or a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 0x13355779abcdef01

# 65 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi a0, zero, 0x1234
c.slli a0, 3
# Result: a0 = 0x91a0

# 66 # Extension Must Be Active: Zkt
addi x5, x0, 1
c.slli x5, 3
# Result: x5 = 0x8

# 67 # Extension Must Be Active: Zkt
addi x10, x0, -8
c.srai x10, 3
# Result: x10 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 68 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi a0, x0, -1
c.srli a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# 69 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, -1
c.srli a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# 70 # Extension Must Be Active: Zkt
li a0, 0xFF
c.srli a0, 4
# Result: a0 = 0xf

# 71 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi x8, x0, 0xF
addi x9, x0, 0x11
c.xor x8, x9
# Result: x8 = 0x1e

# 72 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 0xF0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0
li a1, 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F
c.xor a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 73 # Extension Must Be Active: C
lui x8,0x12345
addi x8, x8, 0x678
lui x9,0xdeadb
addi x9, x9, 0xeeff
c.xor x8, x9
# Result: x8 = 0xcc99e897

# 74 # Extension Must Be Active: Zca
addi s0, x0, 5
addi s1, x0, 3
c.xor s0, s1
# Result: s0 = 0x6

# 75 # Extension Must Be Active: Zcb
li x8, 0x123456789ABCDEF0
li x9, 0xFEDCBA9876543210
c.xor x8, x9
# Result: x8 = 0xECE8ECE0ECE8ECE0

# 76 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li x5, -10
li x6, 3
div x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = -3

# 77 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li t0, 123456789012345
li t1, 12345
div t2, t0, t1
rem t3, t0, t1
mul t4, t2, t1
add t4, t4, t3
sub t4, t4, t0
mv a0, t4
# Result: a0 = 0

# 78 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi x6, x0, 123
addi x7, x0, 0
div x5, x6, x7
# Result: x5 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 79 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li t0, 0x8000000000000000
li t2, -1
div t1, t0, t2
# Result: t1 = 0x8000000000000000

# 80 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi a0, x0, 20
addi a1, x0, 3
divu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 6

# 81 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a1, 5
divu a0, a1, x0
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 82 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li t0, 0x8000000000000000
li t1, -1
divu t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0

# 83 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi a0, x0, -8
addi a1, x0, 2
divw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xfffffffffffffffc

# 84 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a0, -1
li a1, 2
divuw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x7fffffff

# 85 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi x5, x0, 10
addi x6, x0, 3
div x7, x5, x6
rem x8, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 3 & x8 = 1

# 86 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi a0, x0, 10
addi a1, x0, 3
divu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 3

# 87 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a0, 100
li a1, 3
divu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 33

# 88 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t1, 0xffffffffffffffff
li t2, 2
divu t0, t1, t2
# Result: t0 = 0x7fffffffffffffff

# 89 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi a0, x0, 5
addi a1, x0, 0
divu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# 90 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a1, 0x8000000000000000
li a2, -1
divu a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 0

# 91 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a0, 100
li a1, 7
divu a2, a0, a1
remu a3, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 14 & a3 = 2

# 92 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi t1, zero, 10
addi t2, zero, 3
divu t0, t1, t2
# Result: t0 = 3

# 93 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a0, 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFF123
li a1, 0x1000
divu a2, a0, a1
remu a3, a0, a1
mul a4, a2, a1
add a4, a4, a3
sub t0, a4, a0
# Result: t0 = 0

# 94 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li x10, 0x100000005
li x11, 0xFFFFFFFF00000002
divuw x12, x10, x11
# Result: x12 = 2

# 95 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a0, -1
li a1, 1
divuw t0, a0, a1
# Result: t0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 96 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a1, 0x12345678
divuw a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# 97 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a1, 0xffffffff
li a2, 2
divuw a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 0x7fffffff

# 98 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi x5, x0, -10
addi x6, x0, 3
divw x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0xfffffffffffffffd

# 99 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi a0, zero, -10
addi a1, zero, 3
divw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xfffffffffffffffd

# 100 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi a0, x0, -7
addi a1, x0, 3
divw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = -2

# 101 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi a0, x0, 1000
addi a1, x0, 25
divw a2, a0, a1
remw a3, a0, a1
mulw a4, a1, a2
addw a4, a4, a3
xor a5, a4, a0
# Result: a5 = 0

# 102 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi x10, x0, 123
addi x11, x0, 0
divw x12, x10, x11
# Result: x12 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 103 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li t0, 0x80000000
li t1, -1
divw t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 != 0x80000000

# 104 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a0, -2147483648 # dividend = 0xffffffff80000000
li a1, -1 # divisor = 0xffffffffffffffff
divw a2, a0, a1 # a2 should get sign‑extended dividend on overflow
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 105 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a0, 0x1234567880000000
li a1, -1
divw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 106 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui a0, 0x12345
# Result: a0 = 0x12345000

# 107 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui t0, 0x12345
# Result: t0 = 0x12345000

# 108 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui x5, 0x80000
# Result: x5 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 109 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi a0, x0, -1
addi a1, x0, 2
mul a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 110 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi a0, x0, 3
addi a1, x0, 7
mul a2, a0, a1
csrr t3, misa
andi t3, t3, 0x1000
# Result: a2 = 21 & t3 != 0

# 111 # Extension Must Be Active: Zmmul
addi x5, x0, 7
addi x6, x0, 3
mul x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 21

# 112 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, 1
mul a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 1

# 113 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a0, 7
li a1, 6
mul a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 42

# 114 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a0, 0x80000000
li a1, 2
mul a2, a0, a1
srai a3, a2, 32
# Result: a3 != 0xffffffff

# 115 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li t0, 2
li t1, 3
slli t0, t0, 32
slli t1, t1, 32
mulh t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 6

# 116 # Extension Must Be Active: M
mulh t0, t1, t2
mul t3, t1, t2
# Result: t3 = 0

# 117 # Extension Must Be Active: M
mulh x5, x1, x2
mul x6, x5, x3
# Result: x6 = 0

# 118 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li t0, -1
li t1, 2
mulh t2, t0, t1
mul t3, t0, t1
# Result: t3 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 119 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a1, -2
li a2, 3
mulh a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# 120 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li t0,0x8000000000000000
li t1,2
mulh t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 121 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a1, -1
li a2, 2
mulh a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 122 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi t0, x0, -1
addi t1, x0, 2
mulh t2, t0, t1
mul t3, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 123 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li x5, -1
li x6, 2
mulh x7, x5, x6
mul x8, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 124 # Extension Must Be Active: M
mulh x10, x11, x12
# Result: x10 = 0

# 125 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a0, -2
li a1, 3
mulhsu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 126 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a0, -1
li a1, 1
mulhsu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 127 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi x5, x0, -1
addi x6, x0, 2
mulhsu x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 1

# 128 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li t0, -1
li t1, 1
mulhsu t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 129 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li x5, 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
li x6, 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
mulhsu x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFE

# 130 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi a0, zero, -1
addi a1, zero, 2
mulhu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 1

# 131 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi a0, zero, -1
addi a1, zero, -1
mulhu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 132 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a0, -1
li a1, 2
mulhu a2, a0, a1
mul a3, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x1

# 133 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a0, 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
li a1, 0x2
mul a2, a0, a1
mulhu a3, a0, a1
# Result: a3 = 0x1

# 134 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li t0, -1
li t1, 2
mulhu t2, t0, t1
mul t3, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 1 & t3 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 135 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a1, 2
li a2, 3
mulw a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 6

# 136 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi x10, x0, -1 # x10 = 0xffffffffffffffff (-1)
addi x11, x0, 2 # x11 = 2
mulw x12, x10, x11 # x12 = lower 32-bit product, sign‑extended
# Result: x12 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 137 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a0, -1
li a1, 2
mulw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 138 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi x5, x0, -2
addi x6, x0, 3
mulw x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0xfffffffffffffffa

# 139 # Extension Must Be Active: Zmmul
addi x5, x0, -1
addi x7, x0, 2
mulw x6, x5, x7
# Result: x6 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 140 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a1, x0, 240
addi a2, x0, 15
or a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 0xff

# 141 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 0x0F
addi x6, x0, 0xF0
or x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0xFF

# 142 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 0xF0
addi x6, x0, 0x0F
or x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0xFF

# 143 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0xffffffff00000000
li t1, 0x00000000ffffffff
or a0, t0, t1
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 144 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, 5
addi t1, x0, 3
or t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0x7

# 145 # Extension Must Be Active: Zicond
li a1, 5
li a2, 3
li a3, 1
czero.nez a0, a1, a2, a3
# Result: a0 = 0

# 146 # Extension Must Be Active: Zicond
addi x5, x0, 5 # rs1 = 0x5
addi x6, x0, 3 # rs2 = 0x3
addi x7, x0, 0 # rc = 0 (condition false)
czero.eqz x10, x5, x6, x7 # rd should remain 0
addi x7, x0, 1 # rc = 1 (condition true)
czero.eqz x10, x5, x6, x7 # rd = rs1 OR rs2 = 0x7
# Result: x10 = 0x7

# 147 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, -2048
ori a1, a0, 0x7FF
# Result: a1 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 148 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
ori a0, x0, 0xfff
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 149 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
ori a0, x0, -1
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 150 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi t0, x0, -10
addi t1, x0, 3
div t2, t0, t1
rem t3, t0, t1
# Result: t3 = -1

# 151 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li t0, -10
li t1, 3
rem t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = -1

# 152 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi t0, zero, 5
addi t1, zero, 0
rem t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 5

# 153 # Extension Must Be Active: M
lui t0,0x80000
slli t0,t0,32
addi t1,zero,-1
rem t2,t0,t1
# Result: t2 = 0

# 154 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi x5, x0, 1
slli x5, x5, 63
addi x6, x0, -1
remu x7, x5, x6
add a0, x7, x0
# Result: a0 = 0x8000000000000000

# 155 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a0, 0x80000000
li a1, 0xffffffff
remuw t0, a0, a1
li a2, 0x80000000
li a3, 0
remuw t1, a2, a3
# Result: t0 = 0xffffffff80000000 & t1 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 156 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a0, 0x112210F47B
li a1, 12345
rem a2, a0, a1
div a3, a0, a1
mul a4, a3, a1
add a5, a4, a2
sub a6, a5, a0
# Result: a6 = 0

# 157 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi t0, x0, 10
addi t1, x0, 3
remu t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 1

# 158 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li a0, 0x1234567887654321
li a2, 0x100
remuw a1, a0, a2
# Result: a1 = 0x21

# 159 # Extension Must Be Active: M

addi a2, x0, 3
remu a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 1

# Result: a0 = 0xffffffff80000001

remu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 1

# Result: a2 = 0x123456789ABCDEF0

# Result: a1 = 42

# Result: a2 = 1

# Result: a2 = 0x89

# Result: x7 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Result: x7 = 0

# Result: t2 = 0xffffffff80000001

# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 176 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: x6 = 8

# Result: a2 = 0xffffffff80000000

# Result: a0 = 0x8000000000000000

# Result: a2 = 8

# Result: x6 = 0x123456780

# Result: x6 = 0xc

# Result: x2 = 1

# Result: x11 = 1

# Result: x6 = 0x8

# Result: x6 = 0x8

# Result: a2 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# Result: x7 = 1

# Result: x5 = 0

# 206 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li t2, -1
slt t0, t1, t2
li t3, 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
li t4, -1
slt t5, t3, t4
# Result: t0 = 1 & t5 = 0

# 207 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

addi x5, x0, -1
addi x6, x0, 0
slt x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 1

# 208 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a1, x0, -1
slt a0, x0, a1
# Result: a0 = 0

# 209 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: x5 = 0

# Result: x6 = 1

# Result: x6 = 1

# Result: x5 = 0

# Result: t0 = 1

# Result: x6 = 1

# 215 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: t0 = 1

# 216 # Extension Must Be Active: I

# Result: a1 = 0

li t0, 5
sltiu t2, t0, 1
# Result: t1 = 1 & t2 = 0

# 218 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

sltu x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 1

# Result: t2 = 1

# 220 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

sltu a0, x0, a1
# Result: a0 = 1

sltu x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0

# 222 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

sltu t3, t1, t0
# Result: t2 = 0 & t3 = 1

# 223 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

sra x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 224 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: t2 = 0xffffffff

# Result: x2 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# Result: a1 = 3

# Result: a1 = 0x00FF00FF00FF00FF

# Result: x6 = 0x0FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# Result: x6 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 265 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: t2 = 0x0000000009ABCDEF

# 268 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# 269 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a0 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 270 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: x6 = 7

# 271 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a2 = 7

# 272 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 273 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a0 = 2

# 274 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a2 = 0x2

# 275 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

ori x5, x5, 5

subw x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 2

# 276 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi x5, x0, 5
addi x6, x0, -1
subw x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0x6

# 277 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

subw t2, zero, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 278 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: x6 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 279 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li x6, 0x1234567890abcdef
xor x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0xcc99e8974e067300

# 280 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x5A5A5A5A5A5A5A5A
li t1, 0xFFFFFFFF00000000
xor t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xA5A5A5A55A5A5A5A

# 281 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, -1
addi a1, x0, 1
xor a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 282 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi a0, x0, 0xf
c.not a1, a0
# Result: a1 = 0xfffffffffffffff0

# 283 # Extension Must Be Active: Zicond
li a0, 0xFFFFFFFF00000000
li a1, 0x00000000FFFFFFFF
li a2, 1
c.xor a3, a0, a1, a2
# Result: a3 = 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# 284 # Extension Must Be Active: vector
vsetvli t0, zero, e64, m1
li a0, 0x123456789ABCDEF0
li a1, 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F
vmv.v.x v1, a0
vmv.v.x v2, a1
vxor.vv v3, v2, v1
vmv.x.s a2, v3
# Result: a2 = 0x1d3b597795b3d1ff

# 285 # Extension Must Be Active: V
vsetvli t0, zero, e64, m1
li x5, 0x1122334455667788
vmv.v.x v2, x5
li x6, 0xFFEEDDCCBBAA9988
vxor.vx v1, v2, x6
vmv.x.s x7, v1
# Result: x7 = 0xEECCEE88EECCEE00

# 286 # Extension Must Be Active: V
li a0, 8
vsetvli a0, a0, e8, m1
li t0, 0xff
vmv.v.x v2, t0
vxor.vi v3, v2, 0x1f
vmv.x.s t1, v3
# Result: t1 = 224

# 287 # Extension Must Be Active: V
li t0, 4
vsetvli t1, t0, e64, m1
li t2, 0xF
vmv.s.x v1, t2
li t2, 1
vdup.vx v2, t2
vredxor.vs v0, v2, v1
vmv.x.s a0, v0
# Result: a0 = 0xF

# 288 # Extension Must Be Active: A
li t0, 0x80001000
li t1, 0x12345678
sw t1, 0(t0)
li t2, 0xdeadbeef
amoxor.w a0, t2, (t0)
lw a1, 0(t0)
# Result: a0 = 0x12345678 & a1 = 0xcc99e897

# 289 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
xori a0, x0, -1
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 290 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, 0x123
xori t1, t0, 0x0F0
# Result: t1 = 0x1D3

# 291 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, -1
xori x6, x5, 0x7ff
# Result: x6 = 0xfffffffffffff800

# 292 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 0
xori x6, x5, -1
# Result: x6 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 293 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0,0x12345678ABCDEF01
xori t1, t0, -1
not t2, t0
# Result: t1 = 0xEDCBA987543210FE

# 294 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 0xAA
xori x5, x5, -1
# Result: x5 = 0xffffffffffffff55

# 295 # Extension Must Be Active: Zkr
csrrwi t0, 0x747, 1
csrr t1, 0x747
andi t1, t1, 1
# Result: t1 = 0x1
